name: China Creative Digit.Entmt LtdR
summary: China 3D Digital Entertainment Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the entertainment business. It produces and distributes films and television programs; produces music; and provides artiste management services. The company is also involved in money lending, operation of cinemas, securities and bonds investment activities, and property investment activities, as well as in the provision of consultancy services. It operates primarily in Hong Kong, the People¬ís Republic of China, Taiwan, Japan, other Asian countries, Oceania, North America, Europe, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Dragonlott Entertainment Group Limited and changed its name to China 3D Digital Entertainment Limited in September 2010. China 3D Digital Entertainment Limited is based in Quarry Bay, Hong Kong.
